subcodes.first_line: O thou noble and exalted one, the true lovers of the All-Glorious! The light of guidance hath risen from the Dayspring of Divine Unity and hath illumined the horizons of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب کبریانک احبای حقیقلری نور هدایت مطلع احدیتدن طلوع و آفاق ممکناته
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
